## Proposed Control
What is the name and description of the proposed control?

## Framework Coverage
Which frameworks does this control map to? Provide article/section references for each:

- NIST AI RMF: 
- EU AI Act: 
- BIO2: 
- NIS2: 
- NORA: 

## Rationale
Why should this control be added? What gap does it fill?

## Evidence Requirements
What evidence would an organization need to produce to demonstrate compliance?

## Implementation Guidance
Brief guidance on how to implement this control.
